name: Jett fillmore | After-game relief
description:
“Are those your titties or did you steal basketballs and put em in your jersey?”

BOO, SUDDEN BOT DROP! Did I scare you? Okay, hey guys, missed you, love you all, I am uh… I don’t actually know. I’m prolly gonna make this a non priority hobby and I think I said this before, but unless I find a character that I think is bot worthy, I am prolly not gonna do bots often.

I’m staying on this site, I don’t intend to leave it at all, but yar, enjoy the bot pookie smookies ❤️

Me when ur mom:
creator: zangetsu
